zh.Heigham Green, Gazeley, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利
zh.of Heigham Green, Gazeley, Suffolk, Engl: 英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利
zh.of Higham, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可希加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Boyes於大約1398年出生在英國肯特古德內斯同時，她的父親Roger De Boys24歲，母親Margaret Jeningham22歲。她於1418年與Thomas Higham III結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1467年6月在英國素福爾可希加姆享年70歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可加澤利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Boyes于大约1398年出生在英国肯特古德內斯同时，她的父亲Roger De Boys24岁，母亲Margaret Jeningham22岁。她于1418年与Thomas Higham III结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1467年6月在英国素福爾可希加姆享年70岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可加澤利。

nameMeanings.name: Boyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire) and Irish: variant of Boy , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
English and Scottish: variant of   Boyce  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of French   Bois  .

variants.name: Boy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans Peter, Heinz, Horst.

English: from the Middle English personal name Boie, which may be from ancient Germanic Boio (see Boye 1 and 2) or an Old English Boia. The latter is common as a first element in English placenames, and is difficult to tell apart from the ordinary word boy, to which it may be related.
English: from Middle English boy ‘young man, servant’, also ‘knave’ or ‘rogue’. Compare Ladd .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Boyes was born about 1398, in Goodnestone, Kent, England, her father, Roger De Boys, was 24 and her mother, Margaret Jeningham, was 22. She married Thomas Higham III in 1418. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in June 1467, in Higham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Gazeley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Boyes est née environ 1398, à Goodnestone, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Roger De Boys, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jeningham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Higham III en 1418. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1467, à Higham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Gazeley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Boyes um 1398 in Goodnestone, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger De Boys 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret Jeningham 22. Sie hat 1418 Thomas Higham III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1467 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Higham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Gazeley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Boyes è nata il circa 1398 nel Goodnestone, Kent, England, sua padre, Roger De Boys, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret Jeningham, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Higham III nel 1418. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1467, nel Higham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Gazeley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Boyesが約1398年にイギリスケントグドネストーンで生まれた時，父Roger De Boysは24歳，母Margaret Jeninghamは22歳であった。1418年にThomas Higham IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1467年6月にイギリススフォルクヒガムで70歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクガズエリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Boyes(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 켄트 구드네스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger De Boys(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Jeningham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1418년 Thomas Higham III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1467년 6월 영국 수폴크 히아에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 게이즈리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Boyes nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger De Boys, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Jeningham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Higham III em 1418. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1467, em Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Boyes родилась около 1398 г. в местности гуднестоун, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger De Boys было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jeningham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Higham III в 1418 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла июнь 1467 г. в местности хаиам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности газели, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Boyes nació aproximadamente 1398, en Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger De Boys, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Jeningham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas Higham III en 1418. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en junio de 1467, en Higham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
